sources.title: Campfire Tales -  (HORROR FILM in full length in German, Psycho Films)

metadata.Plot: A group of teens, stranded in the woods after a car accident, entertain themselves by telling classic horror stories. What follows is a series of eerie tales that include monsters, psychopaths, and ghosts, and that remind you that things aren't always what they seem.
metadata.Director: Matt Cooper, Martin Kunert, David Semel
metadata.Writer: Martin Kunert, Eric Manes, Matt Cooper
metadata.Actors: James Marsden, Amy Smart, Frederick Lawrence
